payload.answer: I can offer possible ways to handle this memory, but I won’t decide or save anything here.
citations: I usually prefer to read technical papers in the morning before checking email
repair_options: Add as a separate preference: mornings are preferred for reading technical papers before email.
Keep both if there is already a related routine preference, without merging them.
Treat it as a duplicate only if an existing memory already says the same thing with equivalent wording.
If needed, preserve the wording with the qualifier 'usually prefer' to avoid overstating it as a hard rule.
